name: 3dvr-agent
description: A local command-line system for: - building apps with AI - finding and closing real-world customers

scripts.test: node --check thomas-agent/node/send-outreach-email.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/outreach-draft.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/lead-crawl.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/autopilot.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/inbox-monitor.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/oauth-connection.js && bash -n install.sh && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/3dvr && node --test test/*.test.js
